After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. paragraphs: HBSE Board 10th Punjabi Additional Form 2026: Haryana Board of School Education (HBSE) has issued a notification for the HBSE Reappear/Additional Exam Form 2026. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before .28 May 2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the HBSE Reappear/Additional Exam Form 2026 is provided below.
